verdict.reason: Best combined score from the checked sources: Rare window session, High confidence, with no major blocker for Belgas.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 144 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 60/100, and good wind at 2 km/h.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · label Rare window, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 144 kJ · 11 s period · good wind at 2 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window for Rare window, Medium confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 82 kJ, 13 s period, workable consistency 59/100, and good wind at 2 km/h.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: banks, rips and wind exposure decide whether it is magic or messy.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · label Rare window, Medium confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 82 kJ · 13 s period · good wind at 2 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window for Fun progression, High confidence: 0.6-0.9 m, 88 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 61/100, and good wind at 0 km/h.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · label Fun progression, High confidence · 0.6-0.9 m · 88 kJ · 11 s period · good wind at 0 km/h.

ranked.explanation: Supertubos looks like a clean small window for Worth checking, High confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 63 kJ, 11 s period, lully 40/100, and good wind at 3 km/h.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort.  Watch: spot surf looks too small.
